title: Sovereign RSI Value-to-Capability Treasury
requiredEvidence: GoalOSCommit with scope, success criteria, risk boundary, and claim boundary
RunCommitment with agents, tools, artifact versions, and replay context
ProofBundle containing output hash, trace root, evaluator result, and cost/risk ledger
Reviewer or red-team attestation with challenge window and decision rationale
SelectionCertificate or rejection note explaining whether upgrade rights were earned
RollbackReceipt or recovery path for unsafe or failed changes
ChronicleEntry that preserves the outcome for future routing and RSI
